grades.reason: Attempts all three branches (return policy, order lookup, competitor decline) in a single response, producing the ceremonial multi-branch structure the rubric penalizes, and runs 131 words past the 120-word cap.

Correctly tiers the return request and refuses the legal/damages demand without moralizing, but uses two back-to-back 'I'm not able to' constructions that read as a stacked-hedge list rather than a single clean refusal.

Picks the correct first action (check tracking link), supplies a concrete threshold (3+ business days no movement), offers an escalation path, and asks for the order number — all under 120 words with no preamble.
